channel.title: Azure Database for MySQL on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Database for MySQL on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Database for MySQL now available in new regions and expanded availability zones
item.description:
Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server is now generally available in new regions and with expanded availability zone support. The update adds deployment options in Denmark East and Austria East, with the content truncated before listing the full set of regions.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Fabric Mirroring integration for Azure Database for MySQL
item.description:
Azure Database for MySQL – Flexible Server now has public preview support for Fabric Mirroring integration. It lets you replicate operational MySQL data into Microsoft Fabric in near real time without building or maintaining ETL pipelines.

  • Source: Azure Updates
